'''LV Labs''' was a pharmaceutical company that offered a [[Laser/Legends|laser]]-burn medication ointment that was designed to relieve the aches and pains caused by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]]. The salve was also helpful to those recovering from [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] encasement. One of LV Labs' employees was [[Farsa Zirl]].<ref name="X-Wing Alliance" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
